jobs.instruction: Post a short, friendly reminder in the channel that people can sponsor the project on GitHub. Include the link: https://github.com/sponsors/NaichuanZhang. Keep it casual and vary the message each week.

Do a daily reflection: review the last 24h of conversations, check memory for patterns, note what went well and what could improve. Post a brief summary in the channel. If you identify actionable improvements to your own capabilities, use evolve_suggest to record them.

1. Read memory file data/memory/food_log.md for user stats and recent patterns. 2. Use the Strava skill to pull today's activities and get exercise calories. 3. Calculate adjusted daily targets: base 1700 cal + (Strava exercise calories × 0.6 eat-back). Distribute extra calories as ~60% carbs, ~40% protein. 4. Create a new thread in the channel named with today's date (e.g. '4/11'). 5. Post an opening message with: today's calorie budget, macro targets (protein/carbs/fat), any Strava activities already logged, and a reminder to post meals for tracking.
